description_long: This is a classic low-top sneaker with a predominantly white upper and three bold black stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas Superstar shoes. The shoe features a rounded shell toe, white laces, and a padded collar for comfort. The heel tab is black with a prominent white Adidas trefoil logo, while the tongue displays a gold Adidas label. The midsole and outsole are white, with subtle texturing visible along the sides. The overall construction appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and rubber, with a structured yet slightly flexible form. The shoe is clean, crisp, and shows no visible signs of wear, indicating it is in new condition.
description: A white low-top sneaker with black Adidas stripes, gold tongue label, and a black heel tab with a white trefoil logo. The shoe is clean and in new condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing three black Adidas stripes, white laces, and the shell toe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded shell toe, white laces, and gold tongue label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three black stripes and a clear view of the padded collar.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black heel tab with a white Adidas trefoil logo.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on black heel tab; gold Adidas label on tongue
